title: GUIDE FOR ANIMAL TEETH CLEANING VIDEOS

preserved_instructions_excerpt:
GROW WITH RASINDU
ANIMAL TEETH CLEANING VIDEOS
– GUIDE
JOIN OUR TELEGRAM CHANNEL👉 GrowWithRasindu
JOIN OUR WHATSAPP CHANNEL👉 GrowWithRasindu
Join my community to get future prompts and complete step-by-step guides
👉 nas.io/growwithrasindu
This guide is written in simple English.If you prefer to read this in your own language,copy this entire guide and paste it into ChatGPT.Then type: "Translate this into [your language]"and it will give you the full guide in your language.
මෙම මාර්ගෝපදේශය සරල ඉංග්‍රීසියෙන් ලියා ඇත.ඔබට ඔබේ භාෂාවෙන් කියවීමට අවශ්‍ය නම්,
මෙම සම්පූර්ණ මාර්ගෝපදේශය copy කර ChatGPT වෙත paste කරන්න.එවිට මෙසේ type කරන්න: "Translate this into Sinhala"එවිට ඔබට සිංහල භාෂාවෙන් සම්පූර්ණ මාර්ගෝපදේශය ලැබෙනු ඇත.
यह गाइड सरल अंग्रेजी में लिखी गई है।अगर आप इसे अपनी भाषा में पढ़ना चाहते हैं,तो इस पूरी गाइड को copy करके ChatGPT में paste करें।फिर टाइप करें: "Translate this into Hindi"और आपको पूरी गाइड हिंदी में मिल जाएगी।
هذا الدليل مكتوب باللغة الإنجليزية البسيطة.
إذا كنت تفضل قراءته بلغتك الخاصة،
انسخ هذا الدليل كاملاً والصقه في ChatGPT.
ثم اكتب: "Translate this into Arabic"
وستحصل على الدليل كاملاً باللغة العربية.
STEP 01 — Paste the Master Prompt into Claude
Copy the master prompt and paste it into Claude.ai
Claude will immediately generate a list of 10 wild animals.
Type the number or name of any animal you want from the list.
Claude will then generate:
8 Image Prompts
7 Video Transition Prompts
Copy all prompts before moving to the next step.
STEP 02 — Generate Images (Google Gemini)
Go to gemini.google.com and open a new chat.
Generating Image 1:
Paste Image Prompt 1 into the Gemini chat and generate the image.
Once Image 1 is generated, copy that image.
Generating Image 2:
Paste the copied Image 1 back into the same Gemini chat as a reference image.
Then paste Image Prompt 2 below it and generate Image 2.
Generating Image 3 and beyond:
Copy Image 2 and paste it into the chat as a reference image.
Then paste Image Prompt 3 and generate Image 3.
Continue this same process for all 8 images:
Always paste the previous image as a reference first
Then paste the next image prompt
Generate the image
Copy the result and repeat
This reference image method keeps the animal character, angle, and setting consistent across all 8 images.
Once all 8 images are generated, download all of them to your device.
STEP 03 — Generate Videos
For generating videos from your images, you have two options:
Option A — OpenArt AI (Recommended) Go to openart.ai
Option B — Google Flow Go to labs.google/flow
⚠️ Note: Google Flow sometimes triggers policy violation errors when generating wildlife dental content. OpenArt AI is recommended to avoid this issue.
How to generate each video clip:
Select the Frame to Video option.
Set Image 1 as the Start frame and Image 2 as the End frame.
Paste Video Transition Prompt 1 as the motion prompt and generate Video Clip 1.
Then set Image 2 as Start and Image 3 as End.
Paste Video Transition Prompt 2 and generate Video Clip 2.
Continue this process for all 7 video clips:
Clip 1 → Image 1 to Image 2 → Transition Prompt 1
Clip 2 → Image 2 to Image 3 → Transition Prompt 2
Clip 3 → Image 3 to Image 4 → Transition Prompt 3
Clip 4 → Image 4 to Image 5 → Transition Prompt 4
Clip 5 → Image 5 to Image 6 → Transition Prompt 5
Clip 6 → Image 6 to Image 7 → Transition Prompt 6
Clip 7 → Image 7 to Image 8 → Transition Prompt 7
Once all 7 video clips are generated, download all of them to your device.
STEP 04 — Edit and Export (CapCut)
Open CapCut and create a new project.
Import all 7 video clips in order from Clip 1 to Clip 7.
Arrange them in sequence on the timeline.
Add background music if needed.
Export the final video and upload to Facebook Reels, YouTube Shorts, or Instagram Reels.
Full Workflow Summary
Master Prompt → Claude.ai
Image Generation → Google Gemini (with reference image method)
Video Generation → OpenArt AI (recommended) or Google Flow
Editing → CapCut
Upload → Facebook Reels / YouTube Shorts / Instagram Reels
